CREATE TABLE ipv6_test (ipv6_address IPv6, cidr UInt8);
SELECT ipv6_address, IPv6CIDRToRange(ipv6_address, cidr) AS range FROM ipv6_test WHERE cidr >= 24;
SELECT COUNT(*), IPv6CIDRToRange(ipv6_address, cidr) FROM ipv6_test GROUP BY range;
WITH toIPv6('2001:0db8:0000:85a3:0000:0000:ac1f:8001') AS test_addr, 32 AS test_cidr SELECT IPv6CIDRToRange(test_addr, test_cidr);
SELECT DISTINCT IPv6CIDRToRange(toIPv6('2001:0db8:0000:85a3:0000:0000:0000:0001'), cidr) FROM ipv6_test WHERE cidr < 128;
SELECT IPv6CIDRToRange(toIPv6('2001:db8::'), 64) AS range_64, IPv6CIDRToRange(toIPv6('2001:db8::1'), 64) AS range_64_1;
CREATE TABLE subnet_test AS SELECT DISTINCT IPv6CIDRToRange(ipv6_address, cidr) AS subnet_range FROM ipv6_test;
SELECT a.ipv6_address, b subnet_range FROM ipv6_test AS a JOIN subnet_test AS b ON IPv6CIDRToRange(a.ipv6_address, a.cidr) = b.subnet_range;
SELECT IPv6CIDRToRange(toIPv6('2001:db8:abcd:0012::'), 30) AS range, COUNT(*) FROM ipv6_test WHERE cidr <= 32 GROUP BY range;
